action.reasoning: Observation: the validation ensemble benchmark shows equal-logit ensembling of the two best ViT runs (checkpoints_vit/best.pt + checkpoints_vit_j8/best.pt) improves validation accuracy to 0.9416 versus 0.9384 for the best single j8 checkpoint. Analysis: unlike prior ResNet ensembling, these are strong ViT checkpoints from different training lengths and the validation gain is meaningful; inference-only submission is cheap and reversible if hidden eval does not transfer. Decision: update predict.py to automatically ensemble the two best ViT checkpoints when available while preserving single-checkpoint fallback, then submit checkpoints_vit_j8/best.pt.
